name: Whispers in the Dark
short_description: An online co-op horror RPG where you run a ghost-hunting agency. Explore haunted locations, uncover the nature of entities, upgrade your skills and tools, and survive their curses.
detailed_description:
👻 A unique cooperative horror RPG
Whispers in the Dark is an online horror game where you manage a paranormal agency. With your teammates, explore haunted locations, gather clues, and face terrifying entities. Your progression relies on an innovative research system that expands your Codex, skills, and equipment.

📚 A research system that changes everything

  • Missions → unlock new maps and paranormal cases.

  • Skills → develop your abilities and unlock new tools.

  • Entities → study and identify the 12 ghosts, revealing their sensitivities and curses.

⚒️ Full RPG progression

  • Earn experience and spend skill points.

  • Customize your playstyle (investigator, tool specialist, hardened survivor).

  • Equip up to 8 skills to create a unique role within the team.

🔧 Evolving equipment

  • Use a wide range of tools (EMF, candle, ghostly book, UV camera, etc.).

  • Each item comes in three qualities: cheap (fragile), good (reliable), or excellent/legendary.

  • Rare artifacts like the Montserrat Crucifix can turn the tide of a mission.

🏚️ Co-op horror with replayability
Each investigation is different: phenomena, behaviors, and clues vary with your choices and progression.
Survive, banish, or seal the entity within its hearth (fetish object)… if you can.

🔑 Key features

  • Online co-op for 1–4 players

  • Innovative research system (missions, skills, entities, items)

  • RPG progression with XP, skill points, and specializations

  • Over 12 entities with unique spells, sensitivities, and behaviors

  • Tools with 3 quality levels (common → legendary)

  • Realistic, oppressive atmosphere with high replay value

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian
